data.content: [2026-04-15] Scope narrowed after review: the original concerns about taxonomy, persistence, and output-path Scene coupling are all resolved. The only remaining work is decoupling the generation path. Specifically, createPlan() in orchestration-plan-manager.ts:431 still delegates to createExplicitOrchestrationSession() + waitForSessionPlan(), which routes through the in-memory orchestration session store (session lifecycle, SSE event emitter, streaming state). The fix is to replace those two calls with a dedicated plan-generation function that invokes the Claude orchestration subprocess directly and returns the plan without touching the session store. The prompt-building and normalization code in orchestration-plan-normalization.ts and orchestration-plan-helpers.ts can be reused — the issue is only the session-store indirection, not the prompt or plan extraction logic.
